name: COMPASS_DIRECTIONS
description: Number of cardinal/intercardinal directions to analyze (8 = N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW)

name: DEFAULT_FORECAST_HOURS
description: Number of hours of forecast data to fetch from Open-Meteo

name: DIRECTION_BATCH_SIZE
description: Number of directions to fetch in parallel per batch (2 = 4 API calls per batch). Lower = safer for rate limits, higher = faster.

name: DIRECTION_SAMPLE_DISTANCE_NM
description: Distance in nautical miles to sample weather in each compass direction

name: TIMELINE_PLAY_INTERVAL_MS
description: Milliseconds between auto-advance steps when playing the forecast timeline
